name: Elm Street Piru
description: The Elm Street Piru is a Blood/Piru set that started in Compton, California and has since spread to Brooklyn, Atlanta, Virginia, Newark, St. Louis, and other cities. In 2009, a father-daughter pair was charged with recruiting high school students across Northern Virginia. In 2020, an Elm Street Piru member shot and killed 8-year-old Secoreia Turner during the Rayshard Brooks protests in Atlanta when her mother's car failed to stop at a gang-erected barricade.
